text:
/ci1 2 無駄な努力よ！　あんたたちの攻撃は
「あたしには届かない」って
あらかじめ決まってるから！

/ci3 2 ちっ、あのオークゥってガキ！
因果律だかなんだか知らんが
攻撃を無効化してやがる！

/ci1 2 All your effort is futile! I determined
in advance that your attacks can't reach me!
The power of calculation is irrefutable!

/ci3 2 That stupid Och kid... I don't know what
all this causality stuff is about, but she's
nullifying our attacks!
